cold_dtc_savings.name: BR Multi-Channel — Cold DTC Savings
cold_dtc_savings.description: Cold outreach to DTC ecommerce brands with high shipping cost signals. Primary sequence for new Apollo-sourced contacts.

expansion_signal.name: BR Multi-Channel — Expansion Signal
expansion_signal.description: Expansion outreach to brands showing growth signals (Shopify Plus upgrade, new warehouse, hiring logistics roles). Warmer tone, references specific growth signal.

targeting_split.note: 60% of daily send volume targets 3PL/fulfillment companies, 40% targets DTC brands directly

notes: HubSpot sequence IDs are null because we use direct send (not HubSpot Sequences) due to a connected inbox sender identity bug. The sequence names are used for tracking/reporting only.
